Admission Types

Prison populations are shaped by two primary groups: new court commitments, or individuals newly incarcerated for a criminal offense, and parole returns/revocations, those who return to prison for failing to meet the conditions of their parole.

No Data. Arizona did not submit data to the National Corrections Reporting Program in 2020.
